# Paired-study test fixture

These 15 small JSON files are the minimum measured fixture needed to test ParetoPilot's paired
study verifier, checksum failures, and adoption threshold. They were reduced from Arm64 Actions
run [`29940067201`](https://github.com/agrovr/ParetoPilot/actions/runs/29940067201) and are not the
project's current published result.

Raw logs, build records, models, and generated reports are intentionally excluded from the test
fixture.
